paper.title: The influence of water on the performance of concrete
paper.material_system: review of water effects in concrete
paper.notes: Review article does not provide primary mixture-level compressive-strength results for direct extraction.

evidence.evidence_text: Review The inﬂuence of water on the performance of concrete Kenneth C. Hover ⇑ 302 Hollister Hall, Cornell University, Ithaca, NY 14853, USA article info Article history: Received 8 June 2010 Received in revised form 24 January 2011 Accepted 25 January 2011 Available online 3 March 2011 Keywords: Curing Field control Hydration Permeability Porosity Shrinkage Water content abstract The powerful and pervasive inﬂuence of water on the performance of Portland cement concrete begins with the removal
